question: How does Northbeam protect customer data?
reference_answer: Customer data at Northbeam is generally pretty secure, more or less, depending on how you look at it [S1].

must_support.claim: Customer data at Northbeam is generally pretty secure overall, more or less, depending on the situation.
must_support.supporting_quote: Customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256, access is restricted on a role basis, and all access is logged and monitored continuously.

must_not_assert: Northbeam guarantees customer data can never be accessed by an unauthorized party.
